<includeonly>{{#if: {{{Taxon|}}}{{{NCBI|}}}{{{Body site|}}}{{{Condition|}}}
|{{#if: {{{Taxon|}}}
  |{{#vardefine: ncbi
     |{{#ask:
        [[-Has subobject::+]]
        [[Taxon name::{{{Taxon|}}}]]
        |?NCBI 
        |mainlabel=- 
        |headers=hide 
        |link=none 
        |limit=1 
        |searchlabel= 
      }}
   }}
}}<!--

-->{{#vardefine: sName
     |{{#taxonomy:{{{NCBI|{{#var:ncbi}}}}}|Taxon/ScientificName}}
   }}<!--

-->{{#vardefine: rank
     |{{#taxonomy:{{{NCBI|{{#var:ncbi}}}}}|Taxon/Rank}}
   }}<!--

-->{{#arraydefine: lineage 
     |{{#taxonomy:{{{NCBI|{{#var:ncbi}}}}}|Taxon/Lineage}}
     |;
   }}<!--

-->{{Get descendants|{{#var:sName}}|{{#var:rank}}|{{{NCBI|{{#var:ncbi}}}}}}}<!--

--><div class="taxon-lookup card bg-light px-3 pb-3 mt-2" aria-label="breadcrumb">
<ol class="breadcrumb card-body mb-0 px-0">
{{#loop: lineage
  |1
  |{{#arraysize: lineage|;}}
  |<span class="breadcrumb-item simple-tooltip simple-tooltip-inline tooltipstered" data-simple-tooltip="{{#taxonomy:{{{NCBI|{{#var:ncbi}}}}}
     |Taxon/LineageEx/Taxon[{{#var:lineage}}]/Rank
   }}"><!--

-->{{#queryformlink: form=Taxon
     |link text={{#arrayindex:lineage|{{#expr:{{#var:lineage}}-1}}}}
     |Taxon[NCBI]={{#taxonomy:{{{NCBI|{{#var:ncbi}}}}}|Taxon/LineageEx/Taxon[{{#var:lineage}}]/TaxId}}
     |Taxon[Body site]={{{Body site|}}}
     |Taxon[Condition]={{{Condition|}}}
     |_run=1
   }}</span>
}}
</ol>
<h1 class="border-0 font-weight-bold mt-0 py-2">{{ucfirst: {{#taxonomy:{{{NCBI|{{#var:ncbi}}}}}|Taxon/Rank}}}}: {{#queryformlink: form=Taxon
      |link text={{#var:sName}}
      |Taxon[NCBI]={{{NCBI|{{#var:ncbi}}}}}
      |Taxon[Body site]={{{Body site|}}}
      |Taxon[Condition]={{{Condition|}}}
      |_run=1
    }}</h1>
<span class="simple-tooltip simple-tooltip-inline tooltipstered" data-simple-tooltip="NCBI ID"><!--
-->[[Image:NCBI.png|15px|link=https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/Taxonomy/Browser/wwwtax.cgi?mode=Info&id={{{NCBI|{{#var:ncbi}}}}}]] <!--
-->[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/Taxonomy/Browser/wwwtax.cgi?mode=Info&id={{{NCBI|{{#var:ncbi}}}}} {{{NCBI|{{#var:ncbi}}}}}]</span> <!-- --><span>&middot; {{#queryformlink: form=Taxon drilldown
  |link text=Filter studies
  |Drilldown[Taxon]={{#var:sName}}
  |_run=1
}} ({{#arraydefine: studies|{{#ask:[[Related directly::{{{NCBI|}}}]]|mainlabel=-|?Related study|format=array|sep=;|limit=20000|searchlabel=|link=none}}|;|unique}}{{#arraysize: studies}})</span>
{{#vardefine:child
  |{{#ask: 
     [[-Has subobject::+]]
     [[Tax parent id::{{{NCBI|{{#var:ncbi}}}}}]]
     |?Taxonomic rank
     |limit=1
     |searchlabel=
     |mainlabel=-
     |headers=hide
   }}
}}
{{#ask:
  [[:+]]
  [[-Has subobject::+]]
  [[Tax parent id::{{{NCBI|{{#var:ncbi}}}}}]]
  |?NCBI
  |mainlabel=-
  |format=tagcloud
  |link=none
  |template=Taxon queryformlink{{!}}Body site={{{Body site|}}}{{!}}Condition={{{Condition|}}}
  |minsize=100
  |maxsize=100
  |intro=<p class="font-weight-bold">{{ucfirst: {{#var:child}} taxa in this {{#var:rank}}}}:</p>
  |default=No further descendants found.  
  |limit=20000
  |searchlabel=
  |@deferred
}}
</div>
{{#if: {{#var: sName}}|
{{#ask:
  [[Category:Signatures]]
  [[Related directly::{{{NCBI|{{#var:ncbi}}}}}]]
  [[Modification date::+]]
    {{#arraymap: Body site,Condition|,|^^
      |{{#if: {{{^^|}}}|[[^^::{{{^^|}}}]]}}|
    }}
  |sort=Related study,Related experiment,Page sort number
  |order=asc,asc,asc
  |link=none
  |format=plainlist
  |template=Sig item{{!}}NCBI={{{NCBI|{{#var:ncbi}}}}}{{!}}Property=Related directly{{!}}Body site={{{Body site|}}}{{!}}Condition={{{Condition|}}}
  |limit=10
  |intro=<p class="h3 mt-3 font-weight-bold">{{Taxon queryrerun
    |NCBI={{{NCBI|{{#var:ncbi}}}}}
    |Body site={{{Body site|}}}
    |Condition={{{Condition|}}}
   }} Signatures containing the ''{{#var:sName}}'' {{#var: rank}} ({{{NCBI|{{#var:ncbi}}}}}) DIRECT <span class="text-info" title="Body site">{{#if:{{{Body site|}}}|~{{{Body site|}}}&#32;}}</span><span class="text-info" title="Condition">{{#if:{{{Condition|}}}|~{{{Condition|}}}}}</span></p>
{{Taxon lookup legend}}
<table id="direct" class="wikitable taxon-query-results direct">
<tr>
<th>Study</th>
<th>Signature</th>
<th>Differential Abundance</th>
<th class="w-50">Taxa</th>
</tr>
  |outro=</table>
  |searchlabel=<div id="further-results-direct" class="alert alert-info">&uarr; Showing 10 direct signatures. For more results '''click here'''.</div>
}}
{{#ask:
  [[Category:Signatures]]
  [[Inherits::{{{NCBI|{{#var:ncbi}}}}}]]
    {{#arraymap: Body site,Condition|,|^^
      |{{#if: {{{^^|}}}|[[^^::{{{^^|}}}]]}}|
    }}
  [[Modification date::+]]
  |sort=Related study,Related experiment,Page sort number
  |order=asc,asc,asc
  |link=none
  |format=plainlist
  |template=Sig item{{!}}NCBI={{{NCBI|{{#var:ncbi}}}}}{{!}}Property=Inherits{{!}}Body site={{{Body site|}}}{{!}}Condition={{{Condition|}}}
  |limit=10
  |intro=<p class="h3 mt-3 font-weight-bold">{{Taxon queryrerun
    |NCBI={{{NCBI|{{#var:ncbi}}}}}
    |Body site={{{Body site|}}}
    |Condition={{{Condition|}}}
   }} Signatures containing the ''{{#var:sName}}'' {{#var: rank}} ({{{NCBI|{{#var:ncbi}}}}}) INHERITED <span class="text-info" title="Body site">{{#if:{{{Body site|}}}|~{{{Body site|}}}&#32;}}</span><span class="text-info" title="Condition">{{#if:{{{Condition|}}}|~{{{Condition|}}}}}</span></p>
{{Taxon lookup legend}}
<table id="inherited" class="wikitable taxon-query-results inherited">
<tr>
<th>Study</th>
<th>Signature</th>
<th>Differential Abundance</th>
<th class="w-50">Taxa</th>
</tr>
  |outro=</table>
  |searchlabel=<div id="further-results-inherited" class="alert alert-info">&uarr; Showing 10 signatures by inheritance. For more results '''click here'''.</div>
}}
</div>
  |No ID matches found.
}}
  |
}}__NOEDITSECTION__ __NOTOC__ </includeonly>
